violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

Rags and a plastic bag were observed on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The open air case was not in good repair, not maintaining ambient temperatures of 41 degrees F or colder. PIC stated unit is not used for foods requiring refrigeration. Inspector observed no foods requiring refrigeration stored in unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Per PIC, the oven was non-functional at the time of this inspection, with repair scheduled for later this week. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The faucet at the hand-washing sink was observed in poor repair, observed leaking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The floors under shelving in the storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
Cases of coffee were observed stored on the floor in the stock room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the store room area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The open-air case is in poor repair, maintaining ambient temperature of 66 degrees. Per PIC, no foods requiring refrigeration are kept in case. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The faucet at the hand sink is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the store room area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Spanish Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Sanitizer bay was refilled, using the chlorine sanitizer packet instead of quaternary ammonia tablets. Sanitizer logs are required to be maintained daily. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The floors beneath storage shelves in the back storage area have an accumulation of dried spilled syrup, soil residue, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
